title: Gaussian VCMoE Simulation Tutorial
text: Install package GitHub remotes: load package:
code: install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("qc-zhao/Varying-Coefficient-Mixture-of-Experts-Model") library(VCMoE)

title: Gaussian VCMoE Simulation Tutorial
text: simulate_vcmoe_gaussian() returns data frame known truth used generate . response Gaussian, component-specific expert coefficients gating probabilities vary continuous coordinate u.

title: Gaussian VCMoE Simulation Tutorial
text: formula two parts: y ~ z1 expert mean model; | x1 gating model. varying coordinate supplied separately u = "u". default, vcmoe_fit() uses Epanechnikov density weights, scaled local-linear basis, unit scaling u.
code: fit <- vcmoe_fit(   y ~ z1 | x1,   data = sim$data,   u = "u",   family = "gaussian",   k = 2,   bandwidth = 0.30,   u_grid = seq(0.1, 0.9, length.out = 5),   control = list(maxit = 80, n_starts = 2, seed = 2) )  fit #> VCMoE fit #>   family: gaussian #>   components: 2 #>   label alignment: global #>   kernel: epanechnikov (density_over_bandwidth) #>   local basis: (u - u0) / bandwidth #>   u scale: unit #>   grid points: 5 #>   bandwidth: 0.3 #>   converged grid points: 5/5

title: Gaussian VCMoE Simulation Tutorial
text: Expert coefficients returned array indexed grid point, component, term. Posterior probabilities returned one column per component.

title: Gaussian VCMoE Simulation Tutorial
text: Always inspect diagnostics interpreting coefficient functions. important early checks grid convergence, label ambiguity, component proportions, posterior entropy, effective local sample size.
code: diagnostics <- vcmoe_diagnostics(fit) diagnostics[, c("u", "converged", "ambiguous", "posterior_entropy", "effective_n")] #>     u converged ambiguous posterior_entropy effective_n #> 1 0.1      TRUE     FALSE         0.2123831    77.73469 #> 2 0.3      TRUE     FALSE         0.2262570   123.66422 #> 3 0.5      TRUE     FALSE         0.2086574   131.44235 #> 4 0.7      TRUE     FALSE         0.1471565   122.84420 #> 5 0.9      TRUE     FALSE         0.1160909    82.69806

title: Gaussian VCMoE Simulation Tutorial
text: plot_coefficients() shows fitted coefficient functions. simulated example, plot mainly quick visual check fitted paths smooth labels remain connected across grid.  plot_posterior() summarizes posterior component probabilities u.
code: plot_coefficients(fit, "expert") plot_posterior(fit)

title: Gaussian VCMoE Simulation Tutorial
text: real analyses, bandwidth usually selected rather fixed hand. cross-validation selector uses held-predictive log-likelihood returns final refit default.
code: selection <- vcmoe_select_bandwidth(   y ~ z1 | x1,   data = sim$data,   u = "u",   family = "gaussian",   k = 2,   bandwidth_grid = c(0.24, 0.30, 0.36),   folds = 3,   u_grid = seq(0.1, 0.9, length.out = 5),   control = list(maxit = 80, n_starts = 2, seed = 3),   seed = 4 )  selection selection$best_bandwidth

title: Extract VCMoE coefficients — coef.vcmoe
text: Extracts expert coefficients, gating coefficients, Gaussian variance intercepts, Gaussian log-sigma local-linear slopes, Negative-Binomial theta, fitted coefficient blocks VCMoE fit.

title: Extract VCMoE coefficients — coef.vcmoe
code: # S3 method for class 'vcmoe' coef(object, type = c("all", "expert", "gating", "sigma", "sigma_slope", "theta"), ...)

title: Extract VCMoE coefficients — coef.vcmoe
text: object vcmoe object. type Coefficient block return. ... Unused.

title: Extract VCMoE coefficients — coef.vcmoe
text: list array fitted coefficient functions.

title: Extract VCMoE coefficients — coef.vcmoe
text: Gaussian fits, coef(fit, "sigma") returns component-specific standard deviation function u_grid point, coef(fit, "sigma_slope") returns scaled local-linear slope log(sigma) (u - u0) / h basis. Binomial fits, expert coefficients logit success-probability scale coef(fit, "sigma") returns NULL. Negative-Binomial fits, expert coefficients log mean count scale, coef(fit, "theta") returns component-specific size parameter, coef(fit, "sigma") returns NULL.

what: Bootstrap confidence intervals for VCMoE coefficients — confint.vcmoe_bootstrap
title: Bootstrap confidence intervals for VCMoE coefficients — confint.vcmoe_bootstrap
text: Summarizes pointwise simultaneous bootstrap intervals expert gating coefficient functions.

title: Bootstrap confidence intervals for VCMoE coefficients — confint.vcmoe_bootstrap
code: # S3 method for class 'vcmoe_bootstrap' confint(   object,   parm = c("expert", "gating"),   level = 0.95,   type = c("pointwise", "simultaneous"),   ... )

title: Bootstrap confidence intervals for VCMoE coefficients — confint.vcmoe_bootstrap
text: object vcmoe_bootstrap object. parm Coefficient set summarize: "expert", "gating", . level Confidence level. type Interval type. "pointwise" uses percentile bootstrap intervals. "simultaneous" uses max standardized bootstrap-deviation band u component term. ... Unused.

title: Bootstrap confidence intervals for VCMoE coefficients — confint.vcmoe_bootstrap
text: tidy data frame columns coefficient_set, term, component, u, estimate, se, lower, upper, type, level, n_successful.

title: Bootstrap confidence intervals for VCMoE coefficients — confint.vcmoe_bootstrap
text: Pointwise intervals percentile intervals grid point. Simultaneous bands compute bootstrap standard errors use empirical quantile maximum standardized absolute deviation u_grid. Near-zero standard errors floored internally avoid division zero.

what: Predict from a VCMoE fit — predict.vcmoe
title: Predict from a VCMoE fit — predict.vcmoe
text: Returns fitted means, component-specific means, posterior probabilities, gating probabilities.

title: Predict from a VCMoE fit — predict.vcmoe
code: # S3 method for class 'vcmoe' predict(object, newdata = NULL, u = NULL,   type = c("mean", "posterior", "component", "prior"), ...)

title: Predict from a VCMoE fit — predict.vcmoe
text: object vcmoe object. newdata Optional data frame. u Optional index values newdata. type Prediction type. ... Unused.

title: Predict from a VCMoE fit — predict.vcmoe
text: vector matrix depending type.

title: Predict from a VCMoE fit — predict.vcmoe
text: Gaussian fits, type = "component" returns component-specific means type = "mean" returns posterior-weighted fitted mean. Binomial fits, type = "component" returns component-specific success probabilities type = "mean" returns marginal success probability. Negative-Binomial fits, type = "component" returns component-specific mean counts type = "mean" returns marginal mean count.

title: Simulate Binomial VCMoE data — simulate_vcmoe_binomial
text: n Number observations. k Number components. Values 2 10 supported. seed Optional random seed. separation Controls expert separation. u Optional numeric vector index values. scenario Simulation scenario: "well_separated", "moderate", "near_overlap", "crossing", "imbalanced_gating". trials Binomial trial counts. Use 1 Bernoulli data, positive integer scalar/vector grouped Binomial data.

what: Parametric bootstrap inference for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_bootstrap
title: Parametric bootstrap inference for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_bootstrap
text: Runs parametric bootstrap inference fitted Gaussian, Binomial, Negative-Binomial VCMoE model k = 2:10.

title: Parametric bootstrap inference for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_bootstrap
code: vcmoe_bootstrap(   fit,   data,   u = NULL,   B = 200L,   coefficient_set = c("expert", "gating"),   seed = NULL,   control = list(),   min_successful = max(20L, ceiling(0.5 * B)),   keep_fits = FALSE,   verbose = FALSE )

title: Parametric bootstrap inference for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_bootstrap
text: fit fitted vcmoe object. Bootstrap inference supports k = 2:10. data Original data frame used fit fit. function resamples data[fit$rows_used, ]. u Optional original u values column name. NULL, stored u column fit reused available. B Number parametric bootstrap replicates. coefficient_set Coefficient sets store summarize: "expert", "gating", . seed Optional random seed. control Named list passed bootstrap refits. Bandwidth reselected inside bootstrap v0. min_successful Minimum number successful replicates expected reliable inference. object returned least two replicates succeed, warning recorded threshold. keep_fits Whether store successful bootstrap fit objects. verbose Whether print replicate progress messages.

title: Parametric bootstrap inference for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_bootstrap
text: object class vcmoe_bootstrap fields fit, replicates, replicate_summary, alignment_summary, settings, warnings, optionally fits.

title: Parametric bootstrap inference for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_bootstrap
text: Gaussian fits, bootstrap data set draws latent component fitted gating probabilities draws response selected component Normal distribution. Binomial fits, bootstrap data set draws success counts selected component success probability. Negative-Binomial fits, bootstrap data set draws counts selected component mean theta. Bernoulli grouped cbind(success, failure) response formats preserved Binomial fits. bootstrap replicate refit formula, family, number components, bandwidth, u_grid, label strategy reference fit. usual within-grid label alignment, one global component permutation matches bootstrap coefficient paths back reference fit. Ambiguous bootstrap--reference matches recorded alignment_summary. Exact permutation matching used small k; assignment-based matching used exhaustive permutation infeasible. Binomial expert coefficients intervals logit coefficient scale. Negative-Binomial expert coefficients intervals log mean count scale.

what: Analytic-style confidence bands for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_confband
title: Analytic-style confidence bands for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_confband
text: Computes HC0 analytic-style Epanechnikov path confidence bands VCMoE fits k = 2:10 using fitted Epanechnikov/scaled parameterization. High-k intervals diagnostic-gated interpreted returned block Hessian diagnostics.

title: Analytic-style confidence bands for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_confband
code: vcmoe_confband(   fit,   data = NULL,   level = 0.95,   type = c("pointwise", "simultaneous"),   coefficient_set = c("expert", "gating", "sigma", "theta"),   strict = TRUE,   control = list() )

title: Analytic-style confidence bands for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_confband
text: fit vcmoe fit. data Optional original data frame. implementation uses fit$fitted; refit control = list(keep_data = TRUE) needed. level Confidence level. type Whether convenience lower upper columns use pointwise intervals simultaneous bands. coefficient_set Coefficient blocks return. strict Whether weak local fits return blocked intervals. control Optional inference controls. HC0 active covariance adjustment.

title: Analytic-style confidence bands for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_confband
text: vcmoe_confband object intervals, diagnostics, settings.

title: Analytic-style confidence bands for a VCMoE fit — vcmoe_confband
text: returned interval table includes pointwise simultaneous columns, diagnostic status, block reasons, Hessian condition, effective local sample size, SCB metadata. Binomial expert intervals logit coefficient scale, Negative-Binomial expert intervals log mean scale, Negative-Binomial theta intervals nuisance diagnostics.

title: Summarize VCMoE fit diagnostics — vcmoe_diagnostics
text: object vcmoe object.

title: Summarize VCMoE fit diagnostics — vcmoe_diagnostics
text: data frame one row per coefficient grid point.

title: Summarize VCMoE fit diagnostics — vcmoe_diagnostics
text: table includes convergence status, iterations, local log-likelihood, local-weighted posterior entropy, label ambiguity flags, alignment margin, effective local sample size, local-weighted component posterior proportions, Binomial expert optimizer diagnostics available. Posterior entropy component proportions use local kernel weights fitted grid point fit retains training data. fit created control$keep_data = FALSE, component proportions fall back unweighted posterior means effective local sample size NA.

what: Fit a varying-coefficient mixture-of-experts model — vcmoe_fit
title: Fit a varying-coefficient mixture-of-experts model — vcmoe_fit
text: Fits Gaussian, Binomial, Negative-Binomial VCMoE model local-linear EM aligns component labels across coefficient-function grid.

title: Fit a varying-coefficient mixture-of-experts model — vcmoe_fit
code: vcmoe_fit(formula, data, u, k = 2L, family = "gaussian",   bandwidth = NULL, u_grid = NULL, control = list(), label = "align",   parameterization = "a1_epanechnikov_scaled", u_scale = c("unit", "none"))

title: Fit a varying-coefficient mixture-of-experts model — vcmoe_fit
text: formula formula form y ~ expert_terms | gating_terms. grouped Binomial data, use cbind(success, failure) ~ expert_terms | gating_terms. Negative-Binomial count data, use expert-side offset(log_size_factor) library-size size-factor offsets. data data frame. u Continuous index column name numeric vector. k Number mixture components. Values 2 10 accepted. High-k fits candidate support require diagnostics. family Model family. "gaussian", "binomial", "negative-binomial" implemented. bandwidth Kernel bandwidth. NULL, default used. u_grid Grid coefficient functions estimated. control Named list overriding EM label-alignment settings. label Label strategy. "align" uses exact global alignment k <= 6 sequential assignment k >= 7. "global" requests exact global alignment feasible falls back sequential assignment path k >= 7. "greedy" keeps older one-step alignment. u_scale transform u fitting. default "unit" maps complete-row u values [0, 1]; "none" leaves u supplied scale. bandwidth u_grid interpreted transformed analysis scale. parameterization Estimator convention. public package uses "a1_epanechnikov_scaled": Epanechnikov density weights 0.75 * (1 - t^2)_+ / h t = (u - u0) / h stores local-linear slopes scaled (u - u0) / h basis.

title: Fit a varying-coefficient mixture-of-experts model — vcmoe_fit
text: object class vcmoe.

title: Fit a varying-coefficient mixture-of-experts model — vcmoe_fit
text: Rows missing non-finite response, covariates, u removed consistently fitting, warning. default, local EM uses Epanechnikov density kernel weights scaled local-linear basis. Complete-row u values mapped [0, 1] fitting unless u_scale = "none". Fitted objects store analysis-scale grid original-scale grid metadata. family = "gaussian", expert mean log-standard-deviation blocks local-linear inside fit. variance block uses log(sigma_ic) = delta_c0(u0) + delta_c1(u0) * (u_i - u0) / h; coef(fit, "sigma") returns exp(delta_c0(u0)) coef(fit, "sigma_slope") returns delta_c1(u0). family = "binomial", Bernoulli responses must 0/1 values grouped responses must use non-negative finite whole-number success/failure counts positive row totals. Binomial expert coefficients logit success-probability scale. Binomial k >= 3 fits accepted experimental stress support treated stable inference-ready support. Binomial expert logistic M-steps use control$binomial_ridge default value 1, control$binomial_structured_starts = TRUE uses structured local starts improve single-trial Bernoulli stability. single-trial Bernoulli responses , gating ridge default also strengthened control$ridge = 1 unless user explicitly supplies control$ridge; grouped Binomial responses keep global default. family = "negative-binomial", responses must finite non-negative whole-number counts. Expert coefficients log mean count scale. Use offset(log_size_factor) expert formula account library size size factors. Gating-side offsets supported v0. coef(fit, "theta") returns component-specific NB size parameters. default label strategy performs local EM grid point, applies post-processing dynamic-programming alignment full grid. Transition costs use previous local-linear slope predict next coefficient value, plus gating, posterior, , Gaussian fits, variance consistency terms. improves label path tracking without changing local EM estimating equations. k <= 6, label = "align" uses exact derivative-aware global alignment. k >= 7, label = "align" label = "global" use sequential pairwise assignment alignment avoid factorial permutation growth record best-vs-second-best assignment margin ambiguity diagnostics.

title: Report Identifiable VCMoE Gating Contrasts — vcmoe_gating_contrasts
text: object vcmoe object. baseline Component used contrast baseline. default, k = 2 uses component 2 k > 2 uses component 1. scaled TRUE, slope contrasts converted scaled local-linear basis (u - u0) / h.

title: Report Identifiable VCMoE Gating Contrasts — vcmoe_gating_contrasts
text: data frame one row per grid point, contrast, term, block.

title: Report Identifiable VCMoE Gating Contrasts — vcmoe_gating_contrasts
text: VCMoE stores gating coefficients centered logits, absolute level component logits identifiable. Interpretable gating effects component contrasts component 1 versus component 2 k = 2, component 1 component 2 versus component 3 k = 3 comparisons baseline = 3.

what: Coefficient-specific GLRT for VCMoE coefficient variation — vcmoe_glrt
title: Coefficient-specific GLRT for VCMoE coefficient variation — vcmoe_glrt
text: Fits constrained null local objective computes generalized likelihood-ratio statistic supplied VCMoE fit.

title: Coefficient-specific GLRT for VCMoE coefficient variation — vcmoe_glrt
code: vcmoe_glrt(   fit,   data,   test = c("coefficient", "constant_all"),   coefficient_set = c("expert", "gating", "sigma", "theta"),   component = NULL,   term = NULL,   calibration = c("analytic_epanechnikov", "bootstrap", "both", "none",     "parametric_bootstrap"),   B = 200L,   seed = NULL,   control = list(),   refit_control = list(),   verbose = FALSE )

title: Coefficient-specific GLRT for VCMoE coefficient variation — vcmoe_glrt
text: fit vcmoe fit. data Original data frame used fit fit. test Test type. "coefficient" tests one coefficient function; "constant_all" tests fitted coefficient functions jointly. coefficient_set Coefficient block coefficient-specific tests. component Component label index coefficient-specific tests. term Term name coefficient-specific tests. calibration Calibration method. "analytic_epanechnikov" uses Epanechnikov modified chi-square calibration; "bootstrap" uses parametric bootstrap calibration; "" reports . "parametric_bootstrap" accepted backwards-compatible alias "bootstrap". B Number bootstrap calibration replicates. seed Optional random seed. control Controls constrained null optimizer. refit_control Controls overriding bootstrap full-model refits. verbose Whether message progress.

title: Coefficient-specific GLRT for VCMoE coefficient variation — vcmoe_glrt
text: vcmoe_glrt object observed lambda, analytic statistic, null fit, optional bootstrap replicate summary, calibrated p-value available.

title: Coefficient-specific GLRT for VCMoE coefficient variation — vcmoe_glrt
text: primary path coefficient-specific. selected coefficient function constrained constant u: local-linear slope fixed zero intercept shared across grid points. null re-optimized rather obtained post-hoc averaging. Analytic Epanechnikov calibration requires Epanechnikov density weights, scaled local-linear basis, unit-scaled u. reports lambda = ell_full - ell_null, analytic_statistic = rK * lambda, modified chi-square analytic_p_value. diagnostic lrt_statistic = 2 * lambda reported separately used analytic p-value. Ridge penalties may used stabilize fitting excluded GLRT likelihood ratio. vcmoe_glrt() supports fitted k = 2:10 models coefficient-specific "constant_all" nulls. k > 2, gating coefficient tests use identifiable baseline contrasts, e.g. component3_vs_component1. Reported p-values interpreted together fit convergence, label ambiguity, component proportion, null-optimizer diagnostics.

title: Inspect VCMoE Parameterization Metadata — vcmoe_parameterization

code: vcmoe_parameterization(object)

title: Inspect VCMoE Parameterization Metadata — vcmoe_parameterization
text: object vcmoe object.

title: Inspect VCMoE Parameterization Metadata — vcmoe_parameterization
text: named list describing estimator convention used fit, including kernel weights, local-linear basis scale, gating-logit storage, dispersion block, label-alignment method, optimization controls.

title: Inspect VCMoE Parameterization Metadata — vcmoe_parameterization
text: package default "a1_epanechnikov_scaled": Epanechnikov density weights 0.75 * (1 - t^2)_+ / h t = (u - u0) / h, scaled local-linear slope storage, centered gating logits. helper reports conventions reproducible model summaries.

what: Convert VCMoE Slopes To A Scaled Local-Linear Basis — vcmoe_scaled_slopes
title: Convert VCMoE Slopes To A Scaled Local-Linear Basis — vcmoe_scaled_slopes
text: Convert VCMoE local-linear slopes scaled-basis slopes.

title: Convert VCMoE Slopes To A Scaled Local-Linear Basis — vcmoe_scaled_slopes
code: vcmoe_scaled_slopes(object, type = c("expert", "gating"), bandwidth = NULL)

title: Convert VCMoE Slopes To A Scaled Local-Linear Basis — vcmoe_scaled_slopes
text: object vcmoe object. type Coefficient block, either "expert" "gating". bandwidth Optional bandwidth used conversion. Defaults fitted bandwidth.

title: Convert VCMoE Slopes To A Scaled Local-Linear Basis — vcmoe_scaled_slopes
text: array dimensions stored slope block.

title: Convert VCMoE Slopes To A Scaled Local-Linear Basis — vcmoe_scaled_slopes
text: VCMoE stores slopes directly scaled basis (u - u0) / h, helper returns stored slopes unchanged. Legacy Gaussian/raw fits store slopes u - u0; fits equivalent scaled-basis slope h * slope_raw. helper performs needed conversion without changing fitted object.

what: Select a VCMoE bandwidth by K-fold cross-validation — vcmoe_select_bandwidth
title: Select a VCMoE bandwidth by K-fold cross-validation — vcmoe_select_bandwidth
text: Selects kernel bandwidth VCMoE model using random K-fold held-predictive log-likelihood. selected bandwidth candidate largest held-likelihood ranking fully successful candidates ahead partial-failure candidates.

title: Select a VCMoE bandwidth by K-fold cross-validation — vcmoe_select_bandwidth
code: vcmoe_select_bandwidth(   formula,   data,   u,   k = 2L,   family = "gaussian",   bandwidth_grid = NULL,   folds = 5L,   u_grid = NULL,   control = list(),   label = "align",   parameterization = "a1_epanechnikov_scaled",   u_scale = c("unit", "none"),   seed = NULL,   refit = TRUE )

title: Select a VCMoE bandwidth by K-fold cross-validation — vcmoe_select_bandwidth
text: formula formula form y ~ expert_terms | gating_terms. data data frame. u Continuous index column name numeric vector. k Number mixture components. Values 2 10 supported. family Model family. "gaussian", "binomial", "negative-binomial" supported. bandwidth_grid Candidate bandwidth values. NULL, uses multiples default bandwidth. folds Number random cross-validation folds. u_grid Grid coefficient functions estimated. control Named list passed vcmoe_fit(). label Label strategy passed vcmoe_fit(). u_scale u scaling strategy passed vcmoe_fit(). default selects bandwidths unit-scaled analysis domain. parameterization Estimator convention passed vcmoe_fit() CV fold optional final refit. seed Optional random seed fold assignment , control$seed absent, deterministic CV refits. refit Whether refit final model data using selected bandwidth.

title: Select a VCMoE bandwidth by K-fold cross-validation — vcmoe_select_bandwidth
text: object class vcmoe_bandwidth_selection fields best_bandwidth, cv_summary, cv_details, cv_folds, fit, settings.

title: Select a VCMoE bandwidth by K-fold cross-validation — vcmoe_select_bandwidth
text: default candidate grid current Silverman-style default bandwidth multiplied c(0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.25, 1.5, 2). Fold assignment made among complete rows vcmoe_fit() keep. Gaussian models, validation scoring uses log sum_c pi_c Normal(y | mu_c, sigma_c). Binomial models, scoring uses log sum_c pi_c Binomial(success | trials, p_c). Binomial Bernoulli grouped cbind(success, failure) responses supported. Negative-Binomial models, scoring uses log sum_c pi_c NB(y | mu_c, theta_c). Bandwidth selection supports k = 2:10 Gaussian, Binomial, Negative-Binomial models. High-k candidates use held-predictive likelihood scoring interpreted together returned fit diagnostics. selected object records fitting parameterization u scaling strategy settings$parameterization settings$u_scale.
